sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92298" key="r(e/on1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥέον</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (ῥέὠ</foreign> <sense id="n92298.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥυτόν</ref> </xr> (<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥυτός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg029:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Astyd.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
